message:
fix(playbook): show target playbook in add success messages

When using --repo flag, the success messages now indicate that rules
were added to the repo playbook:
- Batch: "BATCH ADD RESULTS (repo playbook)"
- Single: "Added bullet b-xxx to repo playbook"

JSON output also includes target and targetPath fields for programmatic use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
